descriptions.gluten: Duk abinci tare da hatsi ko gari (alkama, sha'ir, hatsin rai, spelt): burodi, taliya, pizza, da wuri, kukis, giya
descriptions.eggs: Qwai, omelet, da wuri, mayonnaise, sabon taliya
descriptions.peanuts: Gyada, man gyada, kayan ciye-ciye, kayan zaki
descriptions.soy: Tofu, soya miya, madara soya, edamame
descriptions.milk: Madara, cuku, man shanu, ice cream, cream
descriptions.celery: Seleri, salads, miya, kayan lambu broths
descriptions.sesame: Sesame man, man kazar, humus, burodi
descriptions.sulfites: Wine, giya, busassun 'ya'yan itatuwa, kwakwalwan kwamfuta
descriptions.lupin: Lupine gari, burodi, taliya, abun ciye-ciye
descriptions.mollusks: Mussels, clams, kawa, squid, dorinar ruwa
descriptions.fava_beans: Fava wake, fava waken soup, fava wake puree, stews

warnings.gluten: ⚠️ Gargadi: miya soya na iya ƙunsar alkama
warnings.fava_beans: Rashin G6PD: ko da ƙananan kuɗi na iya haifar da rikicin hemolytic

cardTexts.subtitle: ALJANIN ABINCI
cardTexts.message: Ina da ciwon abinci masu zuwa. Da fatan za a tabbatar cewa abinci na bai ƙunshi waɗannan sinadarai ba, gami da ta hanyar gurɓatawa.
cardTexts.pregnancyMessage: Ina da ciki kuma ina da ciwon abinci kamar haka. Da fatan za a tabbatar cewa abinci na bai ƙunshi waɗannan sinadarai ba, gami da ta hanyar gurɓatawa.
cardTexts.thanks: Na gode sosai don fahimtar ku da taimakon ku.

restrictions.unpasteurized_cheese: Cikakkun da ba a daɗe ba
restrictions.unpasteurized_milk: Nonon da ba a gama ba
restrictions.histamine_fermented: Abinci mai gina jiki (sauerkraut, kimchi, miso)
restrictions.diabetes_sweet_sauces: Sauce mai zaki (ketchup, zaki da tsami, teriyaki)

restrictionCardTexts.message: Don dalilai na lafiya, Ina buƙatar guje wa abinci masu zuwa:

pregnancy.message: Ina da ciki. Don Allah a tabbata abinci na bai ƙunshi abubuwa masu zuwa ba:
pregnancy.sectionMessage: Bugu da ƙari, saboda ciki na, dole ne in guje wa:

no_meat.message:
Ba na cin nama. 
Kifi da sauran kayayyakin dabbobi suna da kyau.
no_meat.sectionMessage:
Bugu da ƙari, ba na cin nama. 
Kifi da sauran kayayyakin dabbobi suna da kyau.

no_meat_fish.message:
Ina bin tsarin cin ganyayyaki. 
Ba na cin nama ko kifi.
no_meat_fish.sectionMessage: Bugu da ƙari, Ina bin tsarin cin ganyayyaki kuma ba na cin nama ko kifi.

no_animal_products.message:
Ina bin tsarin cin ganyayyaki. 
Ba na cin nama, kifi, abincin teku, ƙwai, kiwo, zuma ko kowane kayan dabba.
no_animal_products.sectionMessage: Bugu da ƙari, Ina bin tsarin cin ganyayyaki kuma ba na cin nama, kifi, abincin teku, qwai, kiwo, zuma ko kowane kayan dabba.

nickel.message: Ina da rashin lafiyar nickel. Nickel karfe ne da ake samu a yawancin abinci. Don Allah a tabbata abinci na bai ƙunshi:
nickel.sectionMessage: Bugu da ƙari, Ina da rashin lafiyar nickel. Nickel karfe ne da ake samu a yawancin abinci. Don Allah a tabbata abinci na bai ƙunshi:

histamine.message: Ba zan iya cin abinci mai arziki a cikin histamine ba. Ana samun histamine a cikin abinci na tsufa, datti ko dadewa. Misali:
histamine.sectionMessage: Har ila yau, ba zan iya cin abinci mai arziki a cikin histamine ba. Ana samun histamine a cikin abinci na tsufa, datti ko dadewa. Misali:

diabetes.message: Ina da ciwon sukari kuma ina buƙatar sarrafa yawan sukari na. Don Allah kar a ƙara sukari a abinci na kuma sanar da ni idan ya ƙunshi:
diabetes.sectionMessage: Bugu da ƙari, Ina da ciwon sukari kuma ina buƙatar sarrafa yawan sukari na. Don Allah kar a ƙara sukari a abinci na kuma sanar da ni idan ya ƙunshi:
